title: 一般疑问句
prompt_en: Practice Yes/No questions with be do and can.
prompt_zh: 练习be/do/can构成的一般疑问句。
description: 掌握Are you? / Do you? / Can you? 疑问句及简短回答。
knowledge_points: 疑问句 Yes/No be do can 简短回答

title: 过去疑问句
prompt_en: Practice past tense questions with did and were.
prompt_zh: 练习过去式疑问句：Did you? / Were you?。
description: 掌握Did you? / Were you? 过去疑问句。
knowledge_points: 过去 疑问句 did were 过去时

title: 6W问句
prompt_en: Practice Wh- questions: What Who Where When Why Which.
description: 掌握6W疑问词的用法和疑问句语序。
knowledge_points: Wh- 疑问句 6W 特殊疑问句

title: What与Who详细问
prompt_en: Practice detailed questions with What and Who.
description: 掌握What time/color/kind of 和 Who is/Whose 问句。
knowledge_points: What Who Whose 详细 疑问

title: 数量与价格
description: 掌握How搭配数量/价格/距离/时长的问法。
knowledge_points: How many much far long 疑问

title: 频率与方式
description: 掌握How often/do/about/how was的交流用法。
knowledge_points: How often about 频率 方式 感受
